أكاديمية أفنان لتعليم الأطفال أحكام تجوي: Afnan Academy for teaching children the rules of Quran Tajweed
صرح تعليمي رائد مخصص لتعلم تجويد القرآن: A leading educational institution dedicated to learning Quran Tajweed, combining authenticity and modernity in education.
ابتكر الشيخ محمد حامد مدني طريقة جديدة ل: Sheikh Mohamed Hamed Madani innovated a new method to deliver Tajweed to children in a record time globally, tested it on thousands of children, and proved its effectiveness and success thanks to God Almighty
وذلك بعد دراسة لكل المشاكل التعليمية أثن: This came after studying all educational problems during teaching Tajweed to children for many years
مخطوطة عربية مكتوبة بخط اليد تُفحص بعدسة: A close-up shot of a hand-written Arabic calligraphy scroll being examined with a magnifying glass on a rustic wooden desk
تمكين الطلاب من فهم وتطبيق التجويد وحب ع: Empowering students to understand and apply Tajweed, love the science of Tajweed, and be able to convey it to others.
أن نكون الأكاديمية الرائدة عالمياً في تق: To be the world's leading academy in providing Tajweed science to children in the Islamic world.
التمسك بالمنهج النبوي الصحيح في التدرج ف: Adhering to the correct prophetic methodology in gradual education.
قراءة كتاب الله عز وجل قراءة مفسرة جيدة: Reading the Book of Allah with good, interpreted recitation as the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, recited.
تعليم الطالب مهاره القراءة الصحيحه ومهار: Teaching the student the skill of correct reading, the skill of discovering errors, and the skill of correcting errors.
الشيخ / محمد حامد مدني إسماعيل الطهطاوى: Sheikh Mohamed Hamed Madani Ismail Al-Tahtawi Al-Masry is an Imam, preacher, and teacher at the Egyptian Ministry of Endowments, and a member of the General Syndicate of Memorizers and Reciters of the Holy Quran in the Arab Republic of Egypt. He is the author of Afnan's poetic system for teaching children Quran Tajweed rules and the innovator of a very easy method to teach children Tajweed in just one month through intensive courses, which has proven impressive success and has been learned by thousands of children.
مؤسس ورئيس الأكاديمية والمشرف العام على: Founder and President of the Academy and General Supervisor of its educational curricula.
مؤلف لعدة كتب ومنهجيات في تيسير حفظ القر: Author of several books and methodologies in facilitating Quran memorization and Tajweed.
صورة شخصية مهيبة للشيخ بالزي الإسلامي ال: A professional, dignified portrait of a scholar in traditional Islamic attire
نعتمد في الأكاديمية على طريقة جديده وحدي: At the academy, we adopt a new and modern method in education.
يتلقي الطفل الدرس النظري في التجويد ويتد: The child receives the theoretical lesson in Tajweed and practices it practically.
التعليم بنظام الجداول والمشجرات والخرائط: Education through tables, diagrams, mind maps, and illustrations.
المستوي الأول للمبتدئين والمستوي الثاني: Level 1 for beginners, Level 2 for intermediates, and Level 3 for those seeking certifications and chains of narration.
اختبارات دوريه بعد كل باب وبعد كل مستوي: Periodic tests after each chapter and after each level, with daily exercises during study.
ابدأ رحلتك لتعليم إبنك او إبنتك التجويد: Start your journey to teach your son or daughter Tajweed immediately.
